message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as actor1

participant "GuideTaskStartListener" as A
participant "GuideTaskStartProcessor" as B
participant "GuideTaskStartDomainService" as C
participant "GuideTaskStartStrategy" as D
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as E
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as F
participant "GuideTaskDataRepository" as G

actor1 -> A: 1 监听任务开始消息
A -> B: 2 开始处理
B -> C: 3 查询任务
C -> F:
B -> C: 4 开始任务
C -> D: 5 构建任务
D -> E: 6 根据部门查询导购
E --> D
D -> D: 7 根据导购进行任务分配

group Transaction
C -> G: 8 保存分配给导购的任务
C -> F: 9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动
C -> G: 10 任务流转为执行中
end

@enduml
```
